specs.torque_sequence: Center outward in spiral pattern, numbered sequence 1-10
specs.notes: TTY bolts - replace with new bolts. Do not use impact tools. Verify with OEM service manual for this specific application.
Tighten in two passes - 50% then final torque
Apply anti-seize to prevent seizure in aluminum head
Do not overtighten - aluminum oil pan threads can strip easily
Low torque specification - overtightening will distort cover and cause leaks
TTY bolts - replace with new. Critical engine bearing preload specification. Verify with OEM service manual.

specs.torque_sequence: Both bolts alternately in small increments

Use crankshaft holder tool. Apply thread locker to prevent loosening
Multiple bolt lengths used - ensure correct bolt placement
Retorque after 25 miles. Check regularly for proper torque
Critical safety component - verify torque with calibrated wrench
